abilities.name: A Lost Student's Pain
abilities.text: After a friendly Shenlong model is killed, this model may attach a Fighting Style upgrade.

abilities.name: Explosive Chi
abilities.text: When this model removes a Chi token, it increases its duel total by an additional +1.

actions.name: Rising Block
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Allies within (r)2" of this model gain a Balm token.

triggers.name: Aggressive Chi
triggers.text: Remove a Chi token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Proper Training
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Declare an action on a Fighting Style upgrade attached to an ally. Actions declared this way do not discard upgrades.

triggers.name: Changing Style
triggers.text: Immediately, discard all Fighting Style upgrades from allies in play. Then, attach a Fighting Style upgrade to a model that discarded an upgrade.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.

actions.name: A River Chosen
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Name an ally minion that was killed this game and was not summoned by this crew this game. Replace this model with the named model. Then, the new model heals 3.

triggers.name: New Pupil
triggers.text: Summon an Aspiring Student in base contact with an allied leader. The summoned model does not gain a Summon or Slow token and counts as having activated this turn.
